case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. MIGUEL CHAVEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,792.51 FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, MIGUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-21-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00- SERVED JAN-26-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, MIGUEL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-21-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-21-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, MIGUEL $1,792.51 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,882.51, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, MIGUEL
